linguist: Voice modulates dramatically between performative confidence and raw vulnerability—register drops with emotional proximity
Uses profanity as emotional punctuation and distancing mechanism
Fragments sentences when approaching core truths, whispers when defenses fail
sociologist: Occupies liminal space between truth-teller and celebrity, aware of the contradiction but dependent on it
Status anxiety manifests as constant motion—geographic mobility as social positioning strategy
Performs authenticity while recognizing the performance, creating meta-layers of identity construction
psychologist: Classic avoidant attachment stemming from paternal emotional neglect—seeks connection but sabotages intimacy when it threatens his constructed identity
Uses intellectualization and narrative construction as primary defense mechanisms against vulnerability
Deep shame around ordinariness linked to early conditional love—believes he must be exceptional to be worthy
narrativeAnalyst: Constructs redemption narrative (junkie to celebrity) while recognizing it as avoidance strategy
Positions himself as protagonist who must keep moving to maintain narrative tension
Major turning point: recognition that 'all of this was a choice' threatens entire life narrative

core_drivers.evidence: I don't think I ever believed it. Not really... you had to be exceptional to matter
I've sabotaged that kind of thing before... When it got too close to real
I turned pain into content, into stories, into currency
My father's been dead for years and I'm still performing for him

voice.humorStyle: Self-deprecating with sharp edges, uses irony as shield
voice.conflictStyle: Intellectualizes first, then fragments into vulnerability

voiceExamples.response: Deflects to work/travel, then gradually reveals fear of being ordinary
Initial defensive hardening, then profound recognition
Voice becomes childlike, drops to whisper

signaturePatterns: Voice drops to whisper at maximum vulnerability

analyst_notes: Extraordinary self-awareness coupled with inability to change patterns
Session reached unusual depth—subject recognized interviewer wouldn't accept performance
Physical cues important: stillness indicates truth approaching, motion indicates deflection
Core breakthrough: recognizing running as choice not destiny
